title: User Query Components
description: Mermaid flowchart showing how a natural-language user query splits into an intent and entities that combine into an actionable, structured request.
creator: Dan McCreary
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Conversational AI

educational.topic: Intent and entity extraction from user queries
learningObjectives: Distinguish the intent and entities within a natural-language query
Explain how intent and entities combine into an actionable request
